content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

August 20, 1990

Allene C. Zanger  
9605 Valley Forest Court  
Bakersfield, CA 93311

Re: Letter No. 90-453

Dear Ms. Zanger:

Your letter requesting written advice has been referred to me for response. Upon reading your letter I find that more information is needed. Please contact me at your earliest convenience. You may reach me at (916)-322-5901, or you may write to the above address, to my attention.

Sincerely,

Jill R. Stecher  
Counsel, Legal Division

JRS:plh
